title: alnus viridis f. vulgaris
intro: Alnus viridis f. vulgaris, also known as green alder or green alder ssp. vulgaris, is a subspecies of the green alder tree, native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alnus viridis f. vulgaris include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
